sourceOverview.notes: MiMo-V2 models. Emerging, small but capable. No audio APIs yet.

activeModelsSummary.llm:
MiMo-V2-Pro [mimo-v2-pro]
MiMo-V2-Omni [mimo-v2-omni]
MiMo-V2-Flash [mimo-v2-flash] — Open-weight / separate distribution also exists

audit.priceRangeSummary: MiMo-V2-Pro: up to 256K context $1/M input and $3/M output; 256K-1M context $2/M input and $6/M output. Flash family is much cheaper where offered.
audit.limitsSummary: MiMo-V2-Pro supports up to 1M context. Public datacenter detail is not yet clear. No separate public STT API verified; Omni handles audio understanding inside multimodal flow.
audit.regionSummary: Public platform launched in March 2026; exact region/data residency details not yet well documented.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: Public marketing emphasizes speech + singing and expressive control; full language matrix should be validated live before launch.
audit.freeTierSummary: Launch promotions/free access were advertised for limited periods; not necessarily permanent.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Your source sheet is outdated: Xiaomi now has public API models for LLM, omni multimodal, and TTS. STT is folded into Omni rather than a separate public STT product.

supplementalResearch.title: 24. Xiaomi MiMo (China) — LLM ✓ (+ TTS)
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 24. Xiaomi MiMo (China) — LLM ✓ (+ TTS)

**Status:** Just launched **March 18, 2026**. OpenAI-compatible.

`mimo-v2-pro` ($1.00/$4.00, **1M context**), `mimo-v2-flash` ($0.10/$0.30, open-source), `mimo-v2-omni` ($0.40/$2.00, multimodal audio+image+video), `mimo-v2-tts` (speech synthesis with emotion/dialect). Very new — monitor ecosystem maturity.

---
